Openside

The first-ever omnichain and scalable atomic swap protocol

Mesh Liquidity

The modular liquidity layer for omnichain DeFi

Side DLS

The omnichain Delegated Liquid Staking service available on SIDE

SIDE Blockchain
CometBFT
Cosmos SDK
IBC Protocol
CometBFT
Best-In-Class BFT Consensus Engine That Tolerates Up To ⅓ Of Machines Failing Arbitrarily
Onchain Home for Web3
SIDE is a cutting-edge, low-cost, developer-friendly L1 blockchain built to be an open ecosystem that will bring the next billion users to web3.
Pioneering the Next Era
SIDE harnesses the strengths of both modular and monolithic architectures to scale effectively, facilitating mesh liquidity and acting as the foundational settlement and consensus layer for rollups.
Unrivaled Transaction Handling and Scaling
With unmatched scalability and single-block finality, the backbone of SIDE enables it to effortlessly cater to the transaction demands of the evolving Web3 landscape.
Mission
Pioneering Web3's global, trustless
asset exchange platform

Modular
Exchange Layer
for Web3

Discover The Unexplored Side Enter the Web of Endless Opportunities and Unleash Limitless Potential

ARCHITECTURE PRINCIPLES

-001

Scalability

The system is meticulously crafted to ensure easy deployment – with seamless and permissionless chain integration and asset support.

-002

Interoperability

Our hybrid approach, which combines IBC and CCA, enables seamless and secure communication across both homogeneous and heterogeneous chains.

-003

Decentralization

Empowering users with full sovereignty over their assets, Side combines the robust security of decentralized technology with an intuitive, user-friendly interface.

-004

Exchange

A commitment to minimalism and specialization in decentralized asset exchange, focusing on doing one thing exceedingly well.

EMBRACE SIDE
AND TRANSFORM
POSSIBILITIES INTO REALITY

Openside

The first-ever omnichain and scalable atomic swap protocol

Mesh Liquidity

The modular liquidity layer for omnichain DeFi

Side DLS

Cosmos SDK
IBC Protocol

Onchain Home for Web3

SIDE is a cutting-edge, low-cost, developer-friendly L1 blockchain built to be an open ecosystem that will bring the next billion users to web3

Developer-centric Ecosystem

SIDE harnesses the strengths of both modular and monolithic architectures to scale effectively, facilitating mesh liquidity and acting as the foundational settlement and consensus layer for rollups.

Unrivaled Transaction
Handling and Scaling

With unmatched scalability and single-block finality, the backbone of SIDE enables it to effortlessly cater to the transaction demands of the evolving Web3 landscape.

Pioneering Web3's global,
trustless asset exchange
platform
